CreatedAt.description: The date and time the sub-statement was created

UpdatedAt.description: The date and time the sub-statement was last updated

Duration.description: The time in nanoseconds the sub-statement ran

ResultRows.description: Total number of rows in the result set

ResultSize.description: The size of the result set in bytes

HasResultSet.description: Whether the sub-statement has a result set

Error.description: The error message if the sub-statement failed
